title: Traditional Russian Blini Recipe
description: A classic Russian recipe for blini, a type of pancake that is typically served with butter, sour cream, and caviar.

ingredients.name: Dense Wheat Flour
ingredients.notes: all-purpose flour can be used as a substitute

instructions: Combine blini mix, flour, egg, milk, yeast, sugar, and salt in a large bowl.
Mix the batter until it's smooth and free of lumps.
Let the batter rest for 30 minutes in a warm place.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Drop the batter by spoonfuls onto the pan.
Cook the blini for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the blini with melted butter, sour cream, and caviar.
